# LouieLabs Wildlife Cam — HT-HC33 (ESP3: # This file REPLACES the Heltec factory variant table (an 8MB layout). The core
# copies the variant folder's partitions.csv into every HT-HC33 build
# why it overrides any "Partition Scheme"/build.partitions setting. Putting our

# ever touching the storage region below.
# Total flash: 16MB (0x1000000). Offsets/sizes are in hex bytes.
